title: Portuguese Cherry Pasta Bake
description: A delicious and easy-to-make pasta bake with a portuguese twist, featuring sweet cherry tomatoes and a hint of earthy flavor.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add sausage (if using) and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add mushrooms and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in cherry tomatoes and cook until they start to release their juices.
In a large bowl, combine cooked pasta, sausage mixture, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Transfer pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with grated parmesan.
Bake in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Garnish with chopped fresh basil and serve hot.
